name: Three Cheese Roasted Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Russet potatoes, peeled and cut into 1 inch pieces
2 medium carrots, pared and cut into half inch slices
1 large zucchini, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
1 large red bell pepper, cut into 1 inch pieces
2 cups 4 cheese country casserole recipe blend
recipeInstructions:
1. Place potatoes and carrots in a greased 13 x 9 inch baking dish.
2. Drizzle with olive oil; sprinkle with basil, oregano, salt and pepper. Toss lightly to coat.
3. Bake at 425°F for 20 minutes.
4. Add zucchini, red bell pepper, and garlic; stir vegetables.
5. Return to oven and bake 25 more minutes or until all vegetables are tender.
6. Sprinkle with cheese blend; return to oven about 2 more minutes or until cheese melts.
